# Load and filter (H&N)

```{r load-and-filter}
# ── Head & Neck (HNSC) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
hn_load <- load.and.filter.malignant.by.cohorts(
  HNSC_DATASETS,
  filter_unknown_celltypes = TRUE
)

for (ds in HNSC_DATASETS) {
  assign(paste0(ds, ".malignant.orig"), hn_load$malignant_orig_by_cohort[[ds]], envir = .GlobalEnv)
  assign(paste0(ds, ".malignant"), hn_load$malignant_by_cohort[[ds]], envir = .GlobalEnv)
}

Common.HN.Malignant.Genes <- hn_load$gene_universe

TOP_N_FILTER_GENES <- 100

Original.Genes.List <- unique(c(
  c("CDH1", "CDH2", "CDH11", "CTNNB1", "VWF", "COL1A1", "COL1A2", "VEGFA", "IGF1", "IGF2", "CSF1", "CSF1R"),
  c("AXL", "ERBB2", "EGFR", "HLA-A", "HLA-B", "HLA-C", "ESR1", "MKI67", "GATA3", "CTLA4")
))

Top.N.HN.Genes <- Common.HN.Malignant.Genes

message("H&N shared gene filter: ", length(Top.N.HN.Genes),
        " genes (intersection across all H&N datasets).")

message("Unknown-celltype filter applied:")
for (ds in HNSC_DATASETS) {
  report.filter.malignant(
    hn_load$malignant_orig_by_cohort[[ds]],
    hn_load$malignant_by_cohort[[ds]],
    ds
  )
}

for (ds in HNSC_DATASETS) {
  malignant <- get(paste0(ds, ".malignant"), envir = .GlobalEnv)
  assign(paste0(ds, ".malignant"), malignant[Top.N.HN.Genes], envir = .GlobalEnv)
}
```
